reference: Hello. Can my girlfriend become pregnant if we did not have sexual intercourse and she is a virgin? We only had foreplay, and she performed oral sex on me, so the pre-ejaculatory fluid must have been washed away. I did not touch her with pre-ejaculatory fluid. Yes, I fingered her, but with clean fingers. She had her period, and it was regular, although she normally has late periods.
